notes: JSON Schema for .ship/ship.jsonc project manifest at schemas/ship.schema.json
JSON Schema for .ship/agents/<id>.jsonc with identity, skills, MCP, permissions, rules, plugins, provider_settings
JSON Schema for SKILL.md frontmatter with name, description, artifacts, allowed-tools, metadata, tags
JSON Schema for .ship/permissions.jsonc permission presets at schemas/permissions.schema.json
JSON Schema for .ship/mcp.jsonc MCP server definitions at schemas/mcp.schema.json
JSON Schema for skill vars.json default definitions at schemas/vars.schema.json
JSON Schema for event types and payloads at schemas/events.schema.json
Agent schema references upstream Claude, Codex, Gemini, and OpenCode schemas for provider_settings validation
All schemas hosted on GitHub raw URLs for $schema references enabling editor autocompletion
